title: Extension of Non-Executive Director to the Crown Commercial Service
body: "Sara Halton’s term as Non-Executive Director of the Crown Commercial Service has been extended by 5 months, commencing on 12 October 2025 until 31st March 2026.  Sara Halton has held key senior executive positions at well-known British brands, including as Chief Executive Officer of Molton Brown. She brings a wealth of experience in driving strategic growth for global brands. Sara is a Chartered Accountant and has also held a number of other non-executive directorships.  The Crown Commercial Service is an Executive Agency and Trading Fund of the Cabinet Office. It is responsible for managing the procurement of common goods and services, increasing  savings for the taxpayer by centralising buying requirements, and leading procurement policy on behalf of the government. You can read more about the Crown Commercial Service here: Crown Commercial Service.  This appointment is not regulated by the Commissioner for Public Appointments. "
